name: computer-dynamics-v2
description: Computer Dynamics MSP Intranet — Next.js + TypeScript (legacy SQLite compatible)

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev:api" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs npm run dev -w @cd-v2/web"
scripts.dev:license: cd license_activation_system_new && set PYTHONUTF8=1&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& python license_api_server.py
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -k -n api,web,security,license -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs npm run dev -w @cd-v2/web" "npm run security:worker" "npm run dev:license"
scripts.dev:all:turbo: npx concurrently -k -n api,web,security,license -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs npm run dev:turbo -w @cd-v2/web" "npm run security:worker" "npm run dev:license"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cd-v2/database && npm run build -w @cd-v2/backup && npm run build -w @cd-v2/security && npm run build -w @cd-v2/api-handlers && npm run build -w @cd-v2/portal-services && npm run build -w @cd-v2/api && npm run build -w @cd-v2/web
scripts.start:production: npx concurrently -k -n web,api,security,license -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w @cd-v2/web" "npm run start -w @cd-v2/api" "npm run security:worker:prod" "npm run start:license"
scripts.start:production:runtime: npx concurrently -k -n web,api,security,license -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w @cd-v2/web" "npm run start -w @cd-v2/api" "npm run security:worker:run" "npm run start:license"
scripts.start:license: cd license_activation_system_new && set PYTHONUTF8=1&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& python license_api_server.py
scripts.test:auto-repair: npm run build -w @cd-v2/database && npm run build -w @cd-v2/backup && npm run build -w @cd-v2/security && node scripts/test-auto-repair.mjs
